series_metadata.series_description: The Trust department performs periodic site visits at the banks that hold custodial accounts. Records within this file series include, but are not necessary limited to, internal reports, work papers, and supporting documentation that was provided by the custodial bank.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 4 fiscal years. ; Electronic: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 4 fiscal years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
